actions.intent: Advance the urgent lower route immediately.
Break the lower route tax and bring the priority puppy near extraction.
Finish the urgent side while watching dock residue.
Use a planned stabilizer so dock pressure serves the water race.
Clear safe material during the pivot rather than overfilling the dock.
Reconnect through the route after the dock has been stabilized.
Complete the first rescue before water can punish the route.
Pivot through lower-left material toward the safer puppy.
Keep the rack controlled during the second rescue setup.
Finish the upper puppy after proving the water-dock tradeoff.

notes: Designer golden for the pressure choice: route urgency first, one planned dock-safe pivot, then the calmer second rescue.
